objective: Implement the write-ahead journal, snapshot, crash reconcile and audited recovery abandonment.
deliverables: Append-only intent/outcome journal with atomic snapshot replacement and torn-tail detection.
Launch reconcile that marks intent-without-outcome as outcomeUnknown and never replays destructive steps.
Audited abandonment that durably archives interrupted Jobs and preserves device hazards.

verification.expectedEvidence: Every GIVEN/WHEN/THEN/AND clause of openspec/specs/workflow-journal-recovery/spec.md#AC-JOB-002-01 is observed and recorded without restatement or weakening.
Every GIVEN/WHEN/THEN/AND clause of openspec/specs/workflow-journal-recovery/spec.md#AC-JOB-006-01 is observed and recorded without restatement or weakening.
Every GIVEN/WHEN/THEN/AND clause of openspec/specs/workflow-journal-recovery/spec.md#AC-JOB-007-01 is observed and recorded without restatement or weakening.
Every GIVEN/WHEN/THEN/AND clause of openspec/specs/workflow-journal-recovery/spec.md#AC-JOB-007-02 is observed and recorded without restatement or weakening.

verification.method: Crash-window fault injection matrix on the macOS filesystem.
verification.expectedEvidence: Process kills before intent, after durable intent, after side effect and before finalize each reconcile to the defined state; no destructive replay and every unknown outcome is preserved as outcomeUnknown.

stopConditions: An external side effect can dispatch before its intent is durable.
Reconcile guesses or auto-replays an unknown destructive outcome.
